mapper.select: select user_id, username, personal_signature, header_image_adder, sex, birthday, phone_number, follower_amount, liker_amount, writing_amount, like_amount, collect_amount, create_time from User where phone_number=#{phoneNumber}

select user_id, username, personal_signature, header_image_adder, sex, birthday, phone_number, follower_amount, liker_amount, writing_amount, like_amount, collect_amount, create_time from User where phone_number=#{phoneNumber} and password=#{password}
